channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Brandi Carlile @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-07 03:00 — Brandi Carlile at Chase Center. Brandi Carlile's strong storytelling and powerful live performances make this a must-see event.

item.title: Nine Inch Nails @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-16 03:00 — Nine Inch Nails at Chase Center. Nine Inch Nails is known for their intense live shows, making this tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Excision @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-03-14 02:00 → 2026-03-15 02:00 — Excision at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Excision's reputation for high-energy electronic performances draws significant buzz.

item.title: Indigo De Souza @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-07 04:00 — Indigo De Souza at The Fillmore. Indigo De Souza's unique sound and strong live reputation make her a standout act.

item.title: Gogol Bordello @ Warfield
item.description: 2026-03-07 04:00 — Gogol Bordello at Warfield. Gogol Bordello's energetic performances and eclectic style are always a crowd favorite.

item.title: Aimee Mann @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-11 03:00 — Aimee Mann at The Fillmore. Aimee Mann's anniversary tour promises a nostalgic yet fresh experience for fans.

item.title: Whitney @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-13 03:00 — Whitney at The Fillmore. Whitney's indie-folk sound and engaging live shows make this a highly anticipated performance.

item.title: Black Label Society @ Warfield
item.description: 2026-03-15 02:30 — Black Label Society at Warfield. Black Label Society's heavy sound and loyal fan base ensure an exciting live show.

item.title: ALO @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-15 03:00 — ALO at The Fillmore. ALO's blend of rock and funk makes for a fun and lively concert experience.

item.title: The Strumbellas @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-08 04:00 — The Strumbellas at August Hall. The Strumbellas' folk-rock sound and engaging performances are sure to resonate with fans.

item.title: yung kai @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-17 03:00 — yung kai at August Hall. yung kai's tour promises an intimate and engaging performance for fans.

item.title: Silversun Pickups @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-03-08 03:30 — Silversun Pickups at Uptown Theatre Napa. Silversun Pickups' signature sound and live energy make this a must-see show.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Dave's tour is generating buzz, promising a memorable live experience.

item.title: Sarah Kinsley @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-31 03:00 — Sarah Kinsley at August Hall. Sarah Kinsley's rising profile and unique sound make her a noteworthy act.

item.title: Maggie Lindemann @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 — Maggie Lindemann at August Hall. Maggie Lindemann's growing popularity and unique sound make her a noteworthy act.

item.title: Lauren Spencer Smith @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — Lauren Spencer Smith at The Fillmore.

item.title: Zara Larsson @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-03-04 04:00 — Zara Larsson at Fox Theater - Oakland.

item.title: Lauren Spencer Smith @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — Lauren Spencer Smith at The Masonic.

item.title: Natalie Jane @ Great American Music Hall
item.description: 2026-03-03 04:00 — Natalie Jane at Great American Music Hall.
